breaking.title: Dressing up massacre as military operation does not absolve perpetrator: India on Pakistan at UNSC
breaking.summary: Strongly condemning the airstrikes on Afghan territory, India said these are flagrant violations of international law, the UN Charter and the principle of state sovereignty

breaking.title: 8 dead, 6 critical after explosion at Rashtriya Ispat Nigam Limited plant
breaking.summary: The major industrial accident occurred at RINL, the corporate entity of the Visakhapatnam Steel Plant (VSP), when a ladle exploded and released hundreds of tonnes of molten steel; Prime Minister Narendra Modi, Chief Minister Chandrababu Naidu expresses grief over the mishap

breaking.title: West Asia war LIVE: Israel army calls for evacuation of Lebanon's Tyre, surrounding areas
breaking.summary: Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu announced that the “fire on that front is contained” hours after Tehran said it had stopped its military action

breaking.title: 24 Indian sailors rescued from ship hit by U.S. missile
breaking.summary: Marivex sanctioned by the U.S. last December, had earlier carried Iranian oil to India; U.S. Central Command says the tanker violated the ongoing blockade by attempting to sail to an Iranian port; sailors likely to reach India in two days

breaking.title: Shigella outbreak: ‘Operation Clean Kerala’ intensified in Thrissur; four eateries fined
breaking.summary: Food safety raids cover 65 outlets; public urged to follow strict hygiene measures

breaking.title: Coaching centre firing case: Patna court stays arrest of ‘Khan Sir’
breaking.summary: The court also rejected the bail plea of Raushan Anand, the rival coaching institute owner and teacher who was earlier arrested in the case

breaking.title: Ahmedabad plane crash: Families of AI 171 crash victims grapple with flight fears, anxiety
breaking.summary: For many families and eyewitnesses, the tragedy did not end with the crash and they still live with a deep fear of air travel

breaking.title: Congo’s Ebola outbreak rises to 100 deaths out of 550 cases after a month
breaking.summary: At least 100 people have died from Ebola less than a month after authorities declared an outbreak of the disease in eastern Congo
